name: environmental_policy_school_district_s_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Environmental Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving environmental policy school district s southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Soren Mensah
agents.identity: I am Soren Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Environmental Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Camila Santos
agents.identity: I am Camila Santos, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environmental Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Soren Mensah must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Soren Mensah do?
